title: Chapter 82
content:
Chapter 82: Chapter 82: The Scent of Crimson Silk

Su Mei placed her teacup back onto its saucer with a graceful clink

. She elegantly dabbed her glossy red lips with a silk handkerchief and stood up. As she rose, the crimson silk of her tight qipao smoothed out over her impossibly lush figure, instantly drawing Kai’s eyes to the sheer, heavy volume of her massive breasts and the wide flare of her child-bearing hips.

"Well, my sweet Ye Rou," Su Mei sighed, her sultry voice filling the small room. "As much as I would love to stay in this cozy little home all day, I really must be going. The Jade Lotus Pavilion doesn’t run itself, and my husband expects me back before the evening bells."

Ye Rou immediately stood up, her own faded yellow dress bouncing around her generous, motherly curves.

"Wait, wait!" Ye Rou insisted, her sweet face filled with frantic hospitality. "You cannot leave empty-handed! Let me get some things for you to take back. I have fresh medicinal herbs from the garden, and some dried jasmine flowers for your bath!"

Ye Rou hurried to the kitchen counter, her wide, heavy hips swaying as she quickly bundled together several small woven baskets and cloth-wrapped packages. She brought them over, balancing them precariously against her massive, soft chest.

Su Mei looked at the pile of gifts, letting out a breathy, musical laugh.

"Oh, Ye Rou, you are too sweet," Su Mei purred, resting a manicured hand on her hip. "But how in the heavens will I take all this with me? My hands will be completely full, and I cannot ruin this silk dress carrying baskets of dirt and herbs."

Ye Rou paused, realizing the dilemma. Then, her face lit up with a brilliant idea. She turned her beaming smile toward Kai, who was leaning casually against the doorframe, enjoying the view of the two most voluptuous women in the outer sect district.

"Kai will help you!" Ye Rou announced proudly. "He is so strong now. He can carry all of this to your carriage for you. And on the way, you can tell Kai a little more about the work he is going to do at the Pavilion!"

Ye Rou looked at Kai, her eyes wide with innocent, maternal hope. "Right, son? You will help Aunty Su Mei?"

Kai pushed himself off the doorframe, a roguish, charming smile spreading across his lips.

"Ahh, yeah, sure, Mom," Kai said, walking over and effortlessly taking the heavy baskets from her arms. His

Strength 19 made them feel as light as feathers. "No problem at all. I am happy to serve."

Su Mei watched the flex of his biceps as he took the load. Her heavily lined eyes darkened with a predatory hunger. She took a slow step toward him, the intoxicating scent of her rose and musk perfume washing over him.

"Oh, yes," Su Mei murmured, looking up at him through her thick lashes. "And we can also get to know a little more about each other on the walk. Your mom talks so good about you, Kai. She appreciates you a lot."

She reached out, letting her jade-adorned fingers lightly graze the collar of his Academy uniform, sending a deliberate shiver down his spine.

"Maybe," Su Mei whispered, her voice a low, filthy promise, "we can build a very...

good bond with each other. Haha."

"Yeah, sure, Aunty," Kai replied, his voice dropping into a deep, vibrating register. "I am looking forward to bonding with you."

"Wonderful," Su Mei smirked.

They moved toward the door. Ye Rou stood on the small porch, the morning sun illuminating her soft, gorgeous features. She waved her hand at them enthusiastically. Because of the vigorous motion, her massive, uncontained breasts jiggled and bounced heavily under the faded yellow linen, bidding Kai a very distracting farewell.

"Take care, Su Mei!" Ye Rou called out. "And Kai, listen to your Aunty! Be a good boy!"

"I will, Mom!" Kai called back, though his mind was focused on anything but being ’good’.

Kai followed Su Mei down the narrow dirt path of the outer sect district. Watching her walk from behind was a test of supreme endurance. The crimson silk of her dress clung so tightly to her massive, incredibly soft ass that Kai could clearly see the outline of her lace panties underneath. With every step she took in her delicate heels, her huge ass cheeks bounced and jiggled with a hypnotic, side-to-side rhythm.

They reached the main thoroughfare. Waiting for them under the shade of a large willow tree was a luxurious transport.

It was an ornate, lacquered carriage—a beautifully crafted cabin made of dark, polished wood, adorned with gold trim and draped in expensive red silk curtains. It was pulled by two sleek, powerful black horses.

Kai stopped, genuinely surprised. "Oh... so we are going in this?"

Su Mei turned to look at him, her heavy breasts swaying as she pivoted on her heel.

"Of course," Su Mei said, raising a perfectly sculpted eyebrow. "Why? Do you have any problem with riding in luxury, Kai?"

"No..." Kai said, his eyes scanning the plush, velvet-lined interior visible through the open carriage door. "I don’t have any problem."

Su Mei let out a soft, sultry giggle. She stepped closer to him, her chest brushing against his arm.

"Oh, come on, Kai," Su Mei teased, her voice thick with double meaning. "Don’t be shy. I know you’ve probably never experienced such... luxurious things in this outer district. But don’t worry."

She leaned in, her red lips hovering just inches from his ear.

"Your Aunty will let you experience everything."

Kai swallowed hard, the

Dragon’s Vitality in his blood beginning to hum at the blatant provocation.

Su Mei pulled back, a wicked smile on her face. She gestured toward the high step of the carriage, then elegantly extended her soft, manicured hand toward him.

"Come now," she purred, her eyes challenging him. "Be a gentleman and hold my hand. Help me inside."

Kai didn’t hesitate. He shifted the baskets to one arm and reached out with his free hand.

He wrapped his large, rough palm around her soft, delicate fingers. The contrast between his masculine grip and her pampered skin was electric. As she gripped his hand for support, Su Mei deliberately stepped up onto the carriage runner.

To do so, she had to lift her leg high.

The high slit of her crimson qipao fell completely open. Kai was treated to a flawless, unobstructed view of her thick, creamy thigh, wrapped tightly in sheer silk stockings that ended just below the curve of her incredibly plush, jiggly ass cheek. She let out a soft, breathy ahh as she pulled herself into the cabin, ensuring he saw every single inch of flesh she wanted him to see.

Kai handed the baskets to the carriage driver up front, then climbed into the cabin behind her, pulling the small wooden door shut.

Click.

Instantly, the sounds of the bustling street were muffled. The interior of the carriage was incredibly private, intimate, and smelled overwhelmingly of her intoxicating perfume.

The cabin was small. There were two plush velvet bench seats facing each other. Su Mei had already settled onto one, her legs crossed elegantly, her massive breasts resting heavily on her ribcage as she leaned back against the cushions.

Kai sat down on the bench directly across from her. Because the space was so tight, his knees brushed against hers.

The carriage lurched forward, the wheels rolling over the cobblestones. The gentle, swaying motion of the cabin immediately caused Su Mei’s heavy, crimson-wrapped breasts to jiggle softly.

She rested her elbows on the armrests, interlacing her fingers over her stomach. She looked directly into Kai’s dark, hungry eyes, a slow, predatory smile stretching across her glossy red lips.

"Well," Su Mei whispered, the enclosed space making her sultry voice sound incredibly loud and intimate. "I have to say... you’ve grown up pretty much."
